sentences.arabic: الْإِخْلَاصُ شَرْطٌ لِقَبُولِ الْعَمَلِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Ihlas — iskrenost — uslov je da Allah prihvati djelo.
sentences.translationEn: Sincerity (ikhlas) is a condition for Allah's acceptance of a deed.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'Zaista se djela cijene prema nijjetima, i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je nanijetio.'
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet, peace be upon him, said: 'Indeed actions are only by intentions, and every person will have only what they intended.'

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا الْحَدِيثُ يُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ النِّيَّةَ الصَّادِقَةَ تُحَوِّلُ الْأَعْمَالَ الْعَادِيَّةَ إِلَى عِبَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: [Bilježi Buhari u Kitabu bedžil-vahji] Ovaj hadis nas uči da iskrena nijja svakodnevna djela pretvara u ibadet.
sentences.translationEn: [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation] This hadith teaches us that a sincere intention transforms ordinary actions into acts of worship.

sentences.arabic: فَإِنِ اشْتَغَلَ الْمُسْلِمُ بِعَمَلِهِ وَنَوَى بِهِ طَاعَةَ اللَّهِ وَالْإِنْفَاقَ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ، كَانَ ذَلِكَ عِبَادَةً.
sentences.translation: Ako se musliman bavi svojim poslom s namjerom da pokorava Allahu i uzdržava svoju porodicu, to je ibadet.
sentences.translationEn: If a Muslim works at his job intending obedience to Allah and providing for his family, that becomes an act of worship.

sentences.arabic: فَلْيُرَاقِبِ الْمُسْلِمُ نِيَّتَهُ دَائِمًا وَيُخْلِصْهَا لِلَّهِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Neka musliman uvijek pazi na svoju nijju i neka je iskreno posveti jedino Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim should always watch his intention and dedicate it sincerely to Allah alone.
